prompt: We got a report yesterday from someone who enabled agents claude and codex using entire configure, then they manually committed, and they said reviewing with codex it seems to be an issue on the CLI on how it opens a session and if it fails it remains open and fallbacks to Claude Code which is the default value, here is their entire status, remotion-demos/public/screenshots/image.png\
